documentation.value: Logs a diagnostic message to the console. Used for debugging quantum programs.
The message string to log. Supports interpolated strings with curly braces.

signatures.label: H(qubit: Qubit): Unit is Adj + Ctl

documentation.value: Applies the Hadamard gate to a single qubit, creating an equal superposition of |0⟩ and |1⟩.
The qubit to apply the Hadamard gate to.

signatures.label: CNOT(control: Qubit, target: Qubit): Unit is Adj + Ctl

documentation.value: Applies the controlled-NOT (CNOT) gate. Flips the target qubit if the control qubit is |1⟩.
The control qubit.
The target qubit that is flipped when the control is |1⟩.

signatures.label: X(qubit: Qubit): Unit is Adj + Ctl

documentation.value: Applies the Pauli X gate (NOT gate) to a single qubit. Flips |0⟩ to |1⟩ and vice versa.
The qubit to apply the X gate to.

signatures.label: Z(qubit: Qubit): Unit is Adj + Ctl

documentation.value: Applies the Pauli Z gate to a single qubit. Maps |1⟩ to -|1⟩ and leaves |0⟩ unchanged.
The qubit to apply the Z gate to.
Performs a measurement of a single qubit in the computational (Z) basis, returning Zero or One.
The qubit to measure. The qubit collapses to the measured state.

signatures.label: Rx(theta: Double, qubit: Qubit): Unit is Adj + Ctl

documentation.value: Applies a rotation about the X-axis by a given angle theta (in radians).
The angle of rotation in radians.
The qubit to rotate.

signatures.label: Ry(theta: Double, qubit: Qubit): Unit is Adj + Ctl

documentation.value: Applies a rotation about the Y-axis by a given angle theta (in radians).
The angle of rotation in radians.
The qubit to rotate.

signatures.label: Rz(theta: Double, qubit: Qubit): Unit is Adj + Ctl

documentation.value: Applies a rotation about the Z-axis by a given angle theta (in radians).
The angle of rotation in radians.
The qubit to rotate.
Performs a joint measurement of one or more qubits in the specified Pauli bases.
An array of Pauli values (PauliI, PauliX, PauliY, PauliZ) specifying the measurement basis for each qubit.
The array of qubits to measure jointly.
Resets all qubits in the array to the |0⟩ state by measuring and conditionally applying X.
The array of qubits to reset to |0⟩.
Applies a single-qubit operation to each element of a register (qubit array).
The operation to apply to each element (e.g., H, X, Z).
The array of qubits to apply the operation to.
